## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Spec update (data correction in `lib/data.ts`)
- [ ] Documentation (README, comments, guides)

## Checklist

- [ ] `yarn build` passes without errors
- [ ] `yarn tsc --noEmit` reports no type errors
- [ ] Tested on desktop (1440px) and mobile (390px)
- [ ] No hydration mismatches (SSR output matches client render)
- [ ] Spec changes are in `lib/data.ts` only (not hardcoded in components)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in committed files
- [ ] PR description explains the "what" and "why"
